message:
✨ Emit per-run image metadata as workflow artifact (#78)

* ✨ Emit per-run image metadata as workflow artifact

Add an "Emit image metadata" step to all 4 reusable nightly E2E
workflows that captures the actual container images used in each run.

The step scans the guide's values files (after any image overrides
have been applied by yq) and extracts all container image references,
splitting them into llm-d components and other images. The result is
written to $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY for human readability and uploaded as
an `image-metadata` artifact (90-day retention) for API consumption.

This enables downstream consumers (e.g. the KubeStellar Console
nightly E2E dashboard) to show per-run image tags instead of
guide-level tags that are the same for every run.

Artifact JSON schema:
  {
    guideName: string,
    imageOverride: string | null,
    wvaImageTag: string | null,
    llmdImages: Record<string, string>,
    otherImages: Record<string, string>
  }

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Address Copilot review: pin artifact action, gate wvaImageTag

- Pin actions/upload-artifact@v7 → @v7.0.0 for consistency with
  existing upload-artifact usage in the same workflows
- Gate wvaImageTag on DEPLOY_WVA so non-WVA runs emit null instead
  of the default v0.5.0 tag (which is misleading when WVA isn't
  actually deployed)
- Shared script extraction deferred: reusable workflows run in the
  caller repo's workspace, so .github/scripts/ from llm-d-infra
  isn't available without an additional checkout step

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -877,6 +877,56 @@ jobs:
             echo "| Test Target | ${{ inputs.test_target }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           fi
 
+      - name: Emit image metadata
+        if: always()
+        env:
+          DEPLOY_WVA: ${{ inputs.deploy_wva && 'true' || '' }}
+        run: |
+          set -euo pipefail
+          METADATA_FILE=/tmp/image-metadata.json
+          SCAN_PATH="${GUIDE_PATH:-llm-d/guides/$GUIDE_NAME}"
+          LLMD_IMAGES='{}'
+          OTHER_IMAGES='{}'
+          if [ -d "$SCAN_PATH" ]; then
+            while IFS= read -r ref; do
+              [ -z "$ref" ] && continue
+              name=$(echo "$ref" | sed 's|.*/||' | cut -d: -f1)
+              tag=$(echo "$ref" | sed 's/.*://')
+              if echo "$ref" | grep -q 'ghcr\.io/llm-d/'; then
+                LLMD_IMAGES=$(echo "$LLMD_IMAGES" | jq --arg k "$name" --arg v "$tag" '. + {($k): $v}')
+              else
+                OTHER_IMAGES=$(echo "$OTHER_IMAGES" | jq --arg k "$name" --arg v "$tag" '. + {($k): $v}')
+              fi
+            done < <(grep -roh '[a-z][a-z0-9.-]*\.io/[a-zA-Z0-9_./-]*:[a-zA-Z0-9._-]*' "$SCAN_PATH" 2>/dev/null | sort -u)
+          fi
+          jq -n \
+            --arg imageOverride "${IMAGE_OVERRIDE:-}" \
+            --arg wvaImageTag "${WVA_IMAGE_TAG:-}" \
+            --arg deployWva "${DEPLOY_WVA:-}" \
+            --arg guideName "$GUIDE_NAME" \
+            --argjson llmdImages "$LLMD_IMAGES" \
+            --argjson otherImages "$OTHER_IMAGES" \
+            '{
+              guideName: $guideName,
+              imageOverride: (if $imageOverride != "" then $imageOverride else null end),
+              wvaImageTag: (if $deployWva == "true" and $wvaImageTag != "" then $wvaImageTag else null end),
+              llmdImages: $llmdImages,
+              otherImages: $otherImages
+            }' > "$METADATA_FILE"
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "### Resolved Images" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo '```json' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          jq . "$METADATA_FILE" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+
+      - name: Upload image metadata
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7.0.0
+        with:
+          name: image-metadata
+          path: /tmp/image-metadata.json
+          retention-days: 90
+
       - name: Collect pod logs
         if: always()
         run: |

@@ -609,6 +609,54 @@ jobs:
           echo "| Accelerator | $ACCELERATOR_TYPE |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

+          echo '```' >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+
+      - name: Upload image metadata
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v7.0.0
+        with:
+          name: image-metadata
+          path: /tmp/image-metadata.json
+          retention-days: 90
+
       - name: Collect pod logs
         if: always()
         run: |

+        with:

         if: always()

           echo "| Prompts | $NUM_PROMPTS |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
+      - name: Emit image metadata
+        if: always()
